final:
module RefModule(
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire enable,
    input wire interrupt_request,
    output reg interrupt_accepted
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            interrupt_accepted <= 0;
        end else if (enable && interrupt_request) begin
            interrupt_accepted <= 1;
        end else begin
            interrupt_accepted <= 0;
        end
    end
endmodule
